desc: sum() on text column "name" — non-numeric aggregate is a client/422 error, never a 5xx
avg() on text column "name" — non-numeric average rejected cleanly
sum() on the PK text column "id" — text PK cannot be summed
avg() on integer column "n" is a VALID aggregate — must succeed
count(*) with no field — canonical COUNT, must succeed
min() over text column "name" is valid (lexicographic) — succeeds
max() over integer column "n" is valid — succeeds
aggregate func "median" not in AGG_FUNCS enum — 400 validation
aggregate func "stddev" not in AGG_FUNCS enum — 400 validation
aggregate func uppercase "SUM" — enum is case-sensitive, 400
aggregate column missing required "alias" — 400 validation
aggregate with empty aggregates array — AggregateDto requires >=1 logically
op:aggregate but no aggregate spec at all — 400 missing required
aggregate distinct:true with no field — distinct requires a field, 400
count(DISTINCT n) — valid distinct count, succeeds
aggregate distinct as string "true" not boolean — 400 type
aggregate alias as a number not string — 400 type
aggregate field as a number not string — 400 type
aggregate over unknown column "missing_col" — column does not exist
aggregate with non-whitelisted property "rollup" — forbidNonWhitelisted 400
multiple aggregates in one request (count + max + min) — all valid, succeeds
aggregates value is an object not an array — 400 type
groupBy on integer column "n" with count — valid grouping, succeeds
groupBy on text column "name" — valid grouping, succeeds
groupBy on unknown column "ghost" — column does not exist
groupBy empty array with aggregates — degenerates to plain aggregate, succeeds
groupBy with a numeric element not string — 400 type (IsString each)
groupBy as a string not an array — 400 type
groupBy with duplicate columns ["n","n"] — should not 5xx (dedup or accept)
groupBy a reserved column "owner_id" — must not leak cross-tenant; scoped or rejected
groupBy "tenant_id" reserved column — must not surface another tenant id
groupBy + filter scopes rows before grouping — valid, succeeds
groupBy on three columns at once — valid multi-key grouping
groupBy with SQL-injection column name — must be quoted/rejected, never executed
DDL op create_table sent to the CRUD path (op not in ADAPTER_OPS) — 400 enum
DDL op drop_table sent to the CRUD path — 400 invalid op enum
DDL op add_column sent to the CRUD path — 400 invalid op enum
CRUD op "list" sent to the DDL path — not a SCHEMA_DDL_OP, 400 enum
CRUD op "insert" sent to the DDL path — 400 enum
DDL drop_table WITHOUT confirm:true — destructive op must be 400 unconfirmed
DDL drop_column WITHOUT confirm:true — destructive op must be 400 unconfirmed
DDL drop_column with confirm:false explicitly — still unconfirmed, 400
DDL create_table missing required primary_key — 400 validation
DDL create_table with empty columns array — ArrayMinSize(1), 400
DDL create_table column with unknown normalized_type "blob" — not in enum, 400
DDL create_table column normalized_type "objectid" (describe-only) — rejected 400
DDL create_table column normalized_type "unknown" (describe-only) — rejected 400
DDL add_column with no column object — missing required, 400
DDL enum column without enum_values — enum requires values, 400/422
DDL create_table with non-whitelisted top field "engine" — forbidNonWhitelisted 400
DDL column with non-whitelisted field "auto_increment" — 400 (forbidNonWhitelisted nested)
DDL primary_key empty array — ArrayMinSize(1), 400
DDL op as a number not string — 400 enum/type
DDL table name missing entirely — required string, 400
DDL columns over ArrayMaxSize(100) — 101 columns rejected 400
DDL alter_column_type on integer "n" to text — valid alter, applied
DDL alter_column_type to bad type "money" — not in enum, 400
DDL drop_column of a non-existent column "ghost" with confirm — 4xx not 5xx
DDL drop_table of a non-existent table with confirm — 4xx not 5xx
batch of two valid inserts — atomic on pg, succeeds
batch containing a NESTED batch op — BATCH_ITEM_OPS excludes batch, 400 enum
batch with an unknown sub-op "merge" — not in BATCH_ITEM_OPS, 400 enum
batch with empty operations array — should be 400/422, never 5xx
batch operations missing entirely (op:batch alone) — 400/422
batch mixed insert+aggregate — heterogeneous ops, must not 5xx
batch with a sub-op limit over Max(500) — 400 validation
batch sub-op with non-whitelisted field "where" — forbidNonWhitelisted 400
batch with second item conflicting PK — atomic rollback, 409 not partial
batch sub-op with negative offset — Min(0), 400
batch operations as an object not array — 400 type
batch sub-op resource override to a different table — owner-scoped, no 5xx
batch sub-op data as an array not object — 400 type (IsObject)
txn with ZERO operations — ArrayMinSize(1), 400
txn with exactly ONE insert — lower boundary valid, 201 atomic
txn with exactly 50 operations — upper boundary valid (ArrayMaxSize 50)
txn with 51 operations — ArrayMaxSize(50) exceeded, 400
txn op "list" — TXN_OPS is write-only (no reads), 400 enum
txn op "get" — reads not offered in a txn, 400 enum
txn op "aggregate" — not a write op, 400 enum
txn op "batch" — nested batch not allowed in txn, 400 enum
txn missing required "mount" field — 400 validation
txn using legacy field "databaseId" instead of "mount" — non-whitelisted, 400
txn op missing required "resource" — 400 validation
txn to a non-existent mount id — 404 mount_not_found, never 5xx
txn operations as an object not array — 400 type
txn op with non-whitelisted field "returning" — forbidNonWhitelisted 400
txn update op with no filter — empty mutation filter is a safety violation, 4xx
txn delete op with no filter — mass-delete guard, must not silently wipe
txn upsert valid single op — succeeds atomically
txn op op-field as number not string-enum — 400
txn mount as a number not string — 400 type
op completely missing AND action missing — neither op nor action, 400/422
op as empty string "" — not a valid ADAPTER_OP, 400 enum
op "LIST" uppercase — enum is lowercase, 400
op "select" used directly in op (it is a legacy ACTION, not an op) — 400 enum
legacy action "select" via action field — maps to list, succeeds
legacy action "find" via action field — maps to list, succeeds
legacy action "deleteMany" with no filter — maps to delete, guarded not mass-wipe
legacy action "truncate" — not in LEGACY_ACTIONS, 400 enum
both op and action set (op wins) — resolveOp prefers op, succeeds as list
op as a JSON array ["list"] — 400 type/enum
op as boolean true — 400 type/enum
op "upsert" with valid data — supported by pg, succeeds
op "get" with no filter — under-specified read, no 5xx
list limit at Max(500) boundary — valid, succeeds
list limit 501 — over Max(500), 400
list limit 0 — below Min(1), 400
list limit negative -5 — Min(1) violated, 400
list limit as float 2.5 — IsInt violated, 400
list limit as string "10" — implicit conversion may coerce; must not 5xx
list limit as non-numeric string "abc" — 400
list offset negative -1 — Min(0), 400
list offset huge 999999999 — large but valid int, no 5xx
list limit beyond int32 (9999999999) — oversized, 400 not 5xx
list offset as float 1.5 — IsInt, 400
list limit 1 minimum boundary — valid, succeeds
sort {n:"asc"} valid — succeeds
sort {n:"desc"} valid — succeeds
sort direction "ASC" uppercase — invalid direction, no 5xx
sort direction garbage "sideways" — invalid, no 5xx
sort by unknown column "ghost" — column does not exist, no 5xx
sort by reserved column "owner_id" — must not leak/scope-escape
sort as a string not object — 400 type (IsObject)
sort by SQL-injection column name — quoted/rejected, never executed
sort multi-column {n:"asc", name:"desc"} — valid composite sort
insert trying to set owner_id to another principal — stripped or rejected, never honored
insert trying to set tenant_id — reserved, stripped or rejected
upsert trying to override owner_id — reserved column, not honored
update setting owner_id in data — must not reparent the row cross-tenant
update filtering by owner_id to reach another tenant row — owner-scope blocks it
aggregate filter by tenant_id of another tenant — must return only own rows
batch insert with owner_id override in a sub-op — stripped, not cross-tenant
txn insert with tenant_id override — reserved, not honored across mount
data op with anon-only auth (no tenant key) — 401/403, no data leak
data op with NO auth headers — Kong key-auth rejects, 401
data op with a bad tenant key (mbk_invalid) — 401/403, no leak
aggregate with anon-only auth — must not aggregate over another tenant
txn with badkey auth — 401/403 before any write
DDL with anon-only auth — schema change requires the tenant key, 401/403
DDL with no auth — 401
truncated/malformed JSON body — parser returns 400, never 5xx
trailing comma in JSON — strict parser 400
empty body on a POST data op — 400/422 missing op
body is a bare JSON array not object — 400
body is a bare string "list" — 400
body is JSON null — 400/422
body is a bare number 5 — 400
duplicate "op" keys in JSON — last-wins or 400, never 5xx
data field with deeply nested object (5 levels) — handled, no 5xx
filter as a JSON array not object — 400 type
data as a JSON array not object — 400 type
idempotencyKey as a number not string — 400 type
unknown top field "select" alongside op:list — forbidNonWhitelisted 400
unknown top field "where" instead of filter — 400
unknown top field "columns" — 400
unknown top field "returning" on insert — 400
unknown top field "orderBy" instead of sort — 400
unknown top field "page" — 400
unknown top field "__proto__" pollution attempt — rejected, no 5xx
unknown top field "groupBy" at top level (belongs in aggregate) — 400
unknown top field "distinct" at top level — 400
unknown top field "transaction" on a CRUD op — 400
insert with empty data {} — no columns, 4xx not 5xx
insert with no data field at all — 400/422
insert with only an unknown column "zzz" — unknown column, 4xx not 5xx
insert id as wrong type (object) into text PK — 4xx not 5xx
insert n (integer col) as a string "notanint" — type mismatch, 4xx not 5xx
insert with NULL into NOT-NULL PK id — constraint, 409/400 not 5xx
update with empty data {} — nothing to set, 4xx not 5xx
update with no filter and no data — fully under-specified, 4xx
delete with empty filter {} — mass-delete guard, must not silently wipe
delete with no filter at all — guarded, no unscoped wipe
upsert with empty data — 4xx not 5xx
get with filter on unknown column — 4xx not 5xx
insert duplicate primary key (same id twice in sequence) — second is 409 conflict
insert oversized name (10KB string) into text — accepted or 4xx, never 5xx
insert n as float into integer column — coerced or 4xx, never 5xx
insert with filter present (filter ignored on insert) — no 5xx
filter with $gt operator object on n — supported or 4xx, never 5xx
filter with unknown operator $nuke — 4xx not 5xx
filter equality on unknown column "ghost" — column missing, no 5xx
filter value with SQL injection — parameterized, never executed
filter with $in array on id — supported or 4xx, never 5xx
filter deeply nested ($and of conditions) — handled, no 5xx
filter value null (IS NULL semantics) on name — handled, no 5xx
filter on reserved owner_id directly — owner-scope still applies, no cross-tenant
DDL add_column "extra1" text nullable — valid add, applied
DDL add_column with a default expression — valid, applied
DDL add_column enum WITH enum_values — valid enum creation
DDL add_column duplicate of existing column "name" — 409 conflict, not 5xx
DDL add_column to a non-existent table — 404/400, never 5xx
DDL create_table that already exists ({{crudTable}}) — 409 conflict, not 5xx
DDL alter_column_type omitting attributes (merge with current) — valid
DDL alter_column_type of a non-existent column — 404/400, not 5xx
DDL create_table with a column named "owner_id" (reserved auto-append) — handled, no 5xx
DDL create_table with an injection table name — sanitized/rejected, never executed
insert with idempotencyKey — same key+payload single side-effect, succeeds
insert with empty-string idempotencyKey — accepted or 4xx, never 5xx
list with idempotencyKey (no-op on a read) — ignored, succeeds
upsert with idempotencyKey on integer col — valid, no 5xx
